name: stylish_player
description: A modern and customizable music player interface for Volumio.
author: KJavia

volumio_info.details: A modern and customizable music player interface for Volumio.

changes: Added option to show/hide player controls in the UI configuration.
Updated player controls to be hidden when the option is disabled, and made the seek bar read-only in that case.
Improved responsiveness of the player controls and stream info sections.
